Home > Coding Assistant

💻 Coding Assistant

23 tools

Codeium

Personal plan free forever

Established AI coding assistant supporting 70+ languages with broad IDE plugin coverage. Personal tier is completely free with no usage limits. Enterprise tier adds more features.

Coding Assistant ★★★★☆

Tongyi Lingma

Free for individuals

Alibaba's AI coding assistant, deeply integrated with VS Code and JetBrains. Uses Qwen models, excellent Chinese coding experience. Free for individuals, enterprise by seat.

Coding Assistant ★★★★☆

CodeBuddy

Credits for new users

Tencent's AI coding assistant, deeply integrated with Tencent Cloud. Supports code completion, chat, and code review. Free for individuals, enterprise plans available.

Coding Assistant ★★★☆☆

AtomCode

Free (activity)

Huawei-backed open-source terminal AI coding assistant, competing with Claude Code. CodingPlan offers free 30-day access to GLM-5.1, DeepSeek-V4-Flash, Qwen3 series and more, running on Ascend chips with 5-hour rolling window metering.

Coding Assistant ★★★★☆

Cursor

Hobby free plan

AI coding IDE, #1 market share at 31%. Free Hobby plan with no credit card required. Pro at $20/mo supports GPT-4o, Claude and more.

Coding Assistant ★★★★☆

Windsurf

Free plan Light usage

AI coding IDE, formerly Codeium. Free plan at $0/month with Light usage. Cascade feature for multi-file editing. Pro at $20/mo.

Coding Assistant ★★★★☆

Freebuff

Free, ads shown in CLI

Free AI coding agent that edits code via natural language in terminal. Based on paid Codebuff, ad-supported. Uses DeepSeek V4 Flash by default, supports Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7 and other models.

Coding Assistant ★★★★☆

Cline

No free tier

Open-source AI coding assistant for VS Code, JetBrains, and CLI. Supports 200+ models including Claude, GPT, Gemini. Free to use with your own API key.

Coding Assistant ★★★★☆

GitHub Copilot

2000 completions/month (free tier)

Microsoft's AI coding assistant, deeply integrated with VS Code and GitHub. Code completion, Chat, and Agent mode. Free for students and OSS maintainers, $10/month for individuals.

Coding Assistant ★★★★☆

Astron Coding Plan

Trial

Astron Coding Plan by iFlytek is a monthly AI coding subscription service for developers, integrating Spark X2, GLM, Kimi, MiniMax, DeepSeek, Qwen and other popular open-source models. First purchase only ¥3.9/month with unlimited requests.

Coding ★★★★☆

V0.dev

$5 monthly credits, 7 messages/day

Vercel's AI UI generator. Describe or screenshot a UI and get React component code. Free plan: $5 monthly credits + 7 messages/day.

Coding ★★★★☆

Trae

5000 autocompletions/month + 3 basic usage

ByteDance's AI-powered coding IDE with SOLO mode for autonomous development tasks. Free tier offers 5000 autocompletions/month. Pro starts at $15/month. Supports Claude, GPT, and other leading models.

Coding Assistant ★★★★☆

Tabnine

Basic completions unlimited, premium features limited

AI-powered code completion and intelligent suggestion tool supporting multiple programming languages.

Coding ★★★★☆

Replit AI

100 AI queries per month

Replit AI is an AI-powered coding assistant integrated into the Replit online IDE, aiding in code generation, debugging, and learning.

Coding ★★★★☆

Vercel v0

100 generations

An AI tool for generating UI components from text, streamlining frontend development.

Coding ★★★★☆

Create.xyz

10 credits per day

Create.xyz is an AI tool that generates images and designs with a single click, perfect for beginners.

Coding ★★★★☆

Figma AI

50 per month

Figma AI integrates intelligent design tools to enhance design efficiency and collaboration.

Coding ★★★★☆

Framer AI

1 site, limited features

An AI-powered website builder that enables users to create responsive websites quickly with drag-and-drop editing.

Coding ★★★★☆

Void

Unlimited

A free AI image generator that creates images from text prompts. No login, unlimited usage, and fast generation of high-quality visuals.

Coding ★★★★☆

Supermaven

50

An AI-powered coding assistant that enhances developer productivity by generating and editing code efficiently.

Coding ★★★★☆

Pieces

100 times per month

An AI-powered code snippet management and productivity tool designed for developers.

Coding ★★★★☆

CodeRabbit

500 lines/month

AI-powered code review tool that automates detection of issues and enhances code quality and security.

Coding ★★★★☆

Sourcery

50

An AI-powered code review tool that enhances code quality, integrating seamlessly with GitHub for effortless use.

Coding ★★★★☆
